checks.description: Card balances and credit limits displayed correctly
checks.details: All monetary fields use BigDecimal with scale(2). Balance calculations match COBOL PIC 9(7)V99 precision

checks.description: Card data retrieval preserves all fields
checks.details: All 12 COBOL card record fields mapped to Java DTO. No data loss in transformation

checks.description: Card listing requires authentication, masks sensitive data
checks.details: JWT authentication required. Card numbers masked in list view (show last 4 digits). Account-scoped queries prevent cross-account access

checks.description: Pagination behavior matches COBOL screen paging
checks.details: Forward/backward paging tested. Page size 7 matches COBOL BMS map rows. Sort order matches VSAM key sequence
GET /api/v1/cards conforms to specs/cards-api.yml, pagination parameters validated
Record DTOs used, Javadoc references COCRDLIC.cbl, repository pattern for data access, 92% line coverage
